title: SpiceJet Cargo is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: SpiceJet Cargo is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the SpiceJet Cargo family as a Warehouse Manager in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About SpiceJet Cargo:
SpiceJet Cargo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SpiceJet Cargo!
